en: Can you read a teleprompter like a news anchor? Here's your teleprompter test, number three.
Alright, I'm a little nervous. Here we go.
The infamous Johnston cow is still on the run this morning.
The cow has been spotted several times since it escaped Rhode Island Beef and Veal last month.
A viewer contacted NBC10 last night after she saw it in her backyard.
Snapping the picture you just saw off Pine Hill Avenue,
we're told an officer went to her house to try and find the animal, but apparently it got away again.
If you see the cow, please send me a message.
